name: Venison with Plum Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Venison steaks should be approximately 1 inch thick and weigh around 4 ounces each.
Prepare Plum Barbecue Sauce and set aside. Set oven control to broil.
Place venison steaks in a greased broiler pan (without the rack) and spoon half a cup of the barbecue sauce evenly over the steaks. Broil steaks with the tops about 4 inches from the heat until lightly browned, approximately 10 minutes.
Turn the venison over and spoon half a cup of the barbecue sauce evenly over them. Broil until reaching rare to medium-rare doneness, about 5 minutes longer.
Heat the remaining barbecue sauce and serve with the steaks.
